Releases.Summary:
As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, the final battle against Sephiroth begins.
A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, Cloud and his companions must stand against this chaos to not only decide the planet's fate, but bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion.

In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII remake project, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale.

A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here.

Releases.Name: Vale's Echo
Releases.Summary:
2D cozy horror adventure that blends dark comedy, psychological storytelling, and surreal art.

In Vale’s Echo, death isn’t the end — it’s your last chance. Players take on the role of Vale, a sarcastic and troubled soul who wakes up on a mysterious train to nowhere. No pulse. No past. No clue. Her only company? Echo — a floating skull full of secrets, charm, and just the right amount of mischief.

As Vale and Echo journey through the underworld to confront Death and uncover Vale’s past, players will meet a bizarre and unforgettable cast of characters — from chatty fish-human hybrids to leech merchants and morally dubious spirits. Each encounter challenges not just Vale’s choices, but also the player’s empathy, humor, and sense of right and wrong.

Gameplay in Vale’s Echo revolves around dialogue choices, unsettling puzzles, and branching narratives that shape Vale’s relationships, memories, and ultimate fate.

Beneath its eerie charm lies a deeply emotional story connecting the surrea…

Releases.Name: Psycasso
Releases.Summary:
Take on the role of a serial killer who creates paintings with their victims blood! Sell your creations to earn money while trying to avoid capture by the police and other civilians.

In this pixel art adventure you'll play as Psycasso, a struggling gallery artist living in an open world city. By day you'll work a day job to earn money and level up skills, seamlessly blending into society. By night you'll be on the lookout to harvest 'red paint' from one of the 'walking meat-bags' to help you create original 2D art. Sell your artwork to art galleries for huge profits! Become rich from your unique artwork while avoiding capture from the ever growing police presence using stealth techniques and unique traps. Buy property, upgrades, furniture, weapons, discover a bustling city and play a host of mini games in this controversial indie title like nothing before.

Undated.Name: EasyCraft Online
Undated.Summary:
EasyCraft is an online idle RPG set in the world of Valoria, where players take on the role of adventurers tasked with rebuilding a fragmented civilization. Choose from three classes: Warrior, Mage, or Archer, each with three advanced subclasses, and embark on a journey of battles, exploration, and conquest.

The game features real-time turn-based manual combat, automated resource gathering battles, over 200 items with random rarities and attributes, item crafting, resource gathering, equipment enchanting, and durability systems. Explore the Crypt, dangerous dungeons filled with monsters and rare rewards. Interact with NPCs like Doll, Mira, Thalos, and Varen in a village that serves as your base of operations.

Features include guilds with collective abilities, a PvP arena, a player marketplace, a pet system, quests, competitive rankings, real-time chat, daily rewards, and appearance customization. Play directly in your browser or through the desktop application.
Undated.GameModes: Single player · Multiplayer · Co-operative · Massively Multiplayer Online (MMO)
